eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Dolores, CO; at 2:54 PM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 7:54 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Pre-Evacuation/Voluntary Notification for Dolores County from Lone Mesa State Park East to the Dolores/Norwood Road and North to Disappointment Road This is a preparatory notice that conditions are degrading and an Evacuation Notification may be imminent or forthcoming. This is the time to have all necessary items prepared and be ready to move to a safe location.

Pre Evacuation Issued - If you need extra time to leave or have animals you can leave now

Call 970-677-2257 if you need help or have questions
